summary: M15.3: fuse the verifier QKV/Z and full Q/K decode GEMV pairs into one bit-exact split-dual launch. -40 launches/pass, exact AR.

change.kernel: gemv_awq_dual_pack8_multi_row_decode_split_transposed_fp16 (decode_dequant template on the existing dual multi-row kernel)
change.merges: linear_qkv_z (30 layers: 2 singles -> 1 dual) + full_qk (10 layers: 2 singles -> 1 dual)

correctness.smoke: mtp_chain_e2e_smoke D16 B3 decode_batched HIPENGINE_VERIFY_GPU_ACCEPT=validate exact_ar_match=true

decision_reason: Bit-exact dual-decode fuses two weight-amortized single GEMVs into one launch. -40 launches/pass (981->941), kernel -1.4%, verify min -3.0%, cycle_cost clearly lower, exact AR. The economics wall is noisy (+-14% swings); rocprof launch/kernel-time and back-to-back economics are the reliable signals. Default-on.
notes: First economics run showed a spurious +14% wall (thermal/contention); back-to-back plain-vs-dual is the controlled comparison.
Launch-bound verifier: -40 launches ~ -0.8 ms host residual; grind continues.
